prompt:
Use case: vertical cinematic social clip
Primary request: giant cat versus kaiju battle in a dense modern city
Scene/background: dawn after heavy rain, wet streets reflecting city lights, drifting smoke and mist between skyscrapers
Subject: a colossal orange tabby cat with realistic fur and feline motion fighting an original armored kaiju (not based on existing franchises)
Action: in one continuous shot, the giant cat sprints down an avenue, vaults off a bus, collides with the kaiju, then lands and lets out a final roar as debris settles
Camera: vertical 9:16 framing, low-angle handheld chase camera, fast push-in then slight orbit during impact, dynamic but readable composition
Lighting/mood: dramatic storm-break light with volumetric rays, lightning flashes, high contrast, tense and heroic tone
Color palette: steel blue, neon cyan, warm amber highlights, charcoal shadows
Style/format: photoreal cinematic action, large-format camera look, shallow depth of field, 24fps feel, subtle natural motion blur, fine film grain
Timing/beats: 0-2s approach and tension build, 2-6s explosive clash, 6-8s heroic hold with roar and falling debris
Audio: deep creature roars, distant sirens, thunder, concrete cracking, metal impacts, echoing city ambience
Constraints: no blood or gore, no civilians visible, realistic physics, period-neutral city details, keep both creatures fully in frame during key impact
Avoid: text overlays, logos, copyrighted creature likenesses, extra limbs, warped anatomy, jitter, flicker
